title: Malty Chewy Greek Lamb Kebabs
description: A light and flavorful Greek dish featuring lamb kebabs with a malty and chewy texture, made with green curry paste and a deglaze technique, perfect for a halal-friendly meal. The combination of malt and green curry paste creates a unique and delicious flavor profile.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together the green curry paste, malt syrup, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until they are cooked through.
While the kebabs are cooking, prepare the deglaze by whisking together 1 tablespoon of malt syrup and 1 tablespoon of lemon juice.
After the kebabs are done cooking, brush them with the deglaze and serve hot.
Serve the kebabs with your choice of sides, such as rice or roasted vegetables.
Garnish with fresh parsley or dill, if desired.
